executives.name: Bert Nordberg
executives.background: Deputy Chairman. Former Chairman of Vestas Wind Systems and CEO of Sony Mobile Communications.

tenure_dates.title: President and CEO, Sony Mobile Communications

executives.name: John Roos
executives.background: Former U.S. Ambassador to Japan. He has served as a Director since 2013.

executives.name: Nora Denzel
executives.background: Former Interim CEO of Outerwall Inc. and former executive at Intuit and HP. Director since 2014.

executives.name: Peter Bonfield
executives.background: Sir Peter Bonfield is an Independent Director. He was formerly the CEO of British Telecommunications and Chairman and CEO of ICL plc. He has extensive experience in the international technology and telecommunications industries.
